$comment: Security headers for static hosting. CSP also lives as a <meta> in index.html (works on any host); these add transport/frame headers a meta tag cannot set. When the Phase-2 backend is wired, add its origin to connect-src.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
